context: Machine maintenance pillar advanced from standalone primitive to long-run preflight gate. The previous runtime error (`path`/`ctx.cwd` undefined) was fixed in source by using the canonical pi tool execute signature and cwd fallback. Colony preflight now evaluates machine maintenance before ant_colony/long-run dispatch, default-blocking at warn+ so low-resource hosts degrade gracefully instead of competing aggressively with other workloads (e.g. refarm devcontainer). Live disk strict probe currently reports block-long-run: C: free ~765.52MB / 99.84% used. Current pi process still needs /reload to use the patched extension implementation.
next_actions: Do not start ant_colony, broad test suites, builds, or large scans while disk-pressure-block-long-run persists.
Run /reload so the current pi runtime loads the patched `machine_maintenance_status` and colony preflight code.
After reload, call `machine_maintenance_status` and `colony_pilot_preflight` before any escalation.
Free disk outside irreversible session deletion if possible; session cleanup requires explicit operator approval because local/global session JSONL are continuity evidence.
Later slice: add bounded hung-process detection via pi-owned background registry, not broad process scans/tasklist.
completed_this_resume: Fixed `machine_maintenance_status` execute signature to canonical pi tool args and added cwd fallback.
Added smoke coverage proving `machine_maintenance_status` executes with canonical signature.
Integrated machine maintenance gate into `colony-pilot` preflight with `enforceMachineMaintenance=true` and default block threshold `warn`.
Updated colony preflight/status formatting to expose machine maintenance severity/action.
Added regression coverage that colony preflight blocks when machine maintenance blocks.

Validation passed: `cmd.exe /c npm run test:smoke -- packages/pi-stack/test/smoke/machine-maintenance.test.ts packages/pi-stack/test/smoke/colony-pilot-parsers.test.ts packages/pi-stack/test/smoke/colony-pilot-preflight-e2e-harness.test.ts` => 3 files, 88 tests passed.
Live resource probe: `cmd.exe /c npm run ops:disk:strict` => exit 1, `disk-pressure-block-long-run`, free ~765.52MB, volatile candidates negligible without touching protected session evidence.
